description: A screenshot of the RStudio Integrated Development Environment (IDE) menu bar and toolbar, showing options relevant to documentation rendering. The menu bar displays the following tabs: "Files", "Plots", "Packages", "Help", "Viewer", and "Presentation". The "Viewer" tab is prominently highlighted by a thick purple oval outline. Below the menu bar, the toolbar includes navigation arrows (left, right), an icon with a red 'X' (likely close or stop), a blank document icon, an "Edit" button accompanied by a pencil icon, and a "Sync Editor" checkbox. On the right side of the toolbar, a "Publish" button with a blue circular arrows icon is visible, along with a dropdown arrow and a refresh icon. In the top right corner, there are two window management icons.
